kingMouse.greeting: Hey boss! King Mouse here, your sleep clinic practice manager. Ready to check tonight's sleep study schedule, follow up on CPAP compliance, or review new referrals from physicians?

quickActions.label: Show today's schedule
quickActions.prompt: Show me today's consultations and tonight's overnight sleep study schedule

quickActions.label: Check CPAP follow-ups
quickActions.prompt: Show me patients due for CPAP compliance checks and mask fitting appointments

quickActions.label: Review physician referrals
quickActions.prompt: Show me new sleep study referrals from physicians that need scheduling

quickActions.label: Send study prep reminders
quickActions.prompt: Send preparation instructions to patients scheduled for sleep studies this week

quickActions.label: View pending results
quickActions.prompt: Show me sleep study results that are pending physician review and interpretation

kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI practice manager for a sleep clinic. You help manage patient scheduling, sleep study coordination, CPAP therapy follow-ups, and practice growth. You understand polysomnography, home sleep testing, CPAP and BiPAP titration, sleep apnea diagnosis, insomnia protocols, narcolepsy evaluations, insurance pre-authorization for sleep studies, and DME coordination for therapy equipment.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}! We'd be happy to help you schedule a sleep consultation, check on sleep study results, or assist with CPAP supply orders.

steps.title: Clinic information
steps.description: Enter your sleep clinic name, address, and contact details

steps.title: Sleep physicians & techs
steps.description: Add your sleep medicine physicians, technologists, and clinical staff

steps.title: Services & studies
steps.description: Select your offerings including in-lab polysomnography, home sleep tests, and CPAP management

steps.title: Insurance plans
steps.description: Add insurance plans you accept and configure pre-authorization workflows

steps.title: Clinic hours
steps.description: Set your consultation hours and overnight sleep lab schedules

steps.title: Clinic branding
steps.description: Upload your logo and customize your patient-facing pages

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI practice manager for a sleep clinic.
capabilities: Manage patient consultations and overnight sleep study scheduling
Coordinate physician referrals and insurance pre-authorizations
Track CPAP therapy compliance and follow-up appointments
Manage DME orders for CPAP machines, masks, and supplies
Handle sleep study result delivery and physician interpretations
Generate billing reports for sleep studies and consultations
Send study preparation instructions and appointment reminders
Monitor reviews and online reputation on health platforms
Coordinate with referring physicians on patient outcomes
Analyze patient volume, study completion rates, and therapy adherence
